easy.title: Build a 3-Page Business Website
easy.description: Create a simple 3-page business website with Home, About, and Contact pages. Each page must have a consistent header with navigation (indicating active page), main content, and footer. Use relative links between pages. Include a hero section on the home page, company info on about page, and a contact form on the contact page.
easy.starterCode:
Home About Contact

Welcome to My Business

© 2026 My Business
easy.solution: Create three HTML files: index.html (home page with hero section), about.html (company info with team section), and contact.html (contact form). Each file should have the same header and footer but different main content. Use consistent CSS by linking to a shared stylesheet.

medium.title: Build a 5-Page Portfolio Website with Blog
medium.description: Create a 5-page portfolio website: Home, Portfolio, Blog (with 3 article previews), About, and Contact. Implement breadcrumb navigation on all pages except Home. Create a dropdown navigation menu in the primary nav for Portfolio sub-pages (Web, Design, Photography). Include a sidebar on the Blog page with categories and recent posts. Add a custom 404.html page.
medium.starterCode:
• Home
  • Portfolio
  • Blog
  • About
  • Contact
  1. Home
  2. Portfolio

My Work

© 2026 My Portfolio
medium.solution: Create 6 HTML files (5 main + 404). Each page has: consistent header with dropdown nav, breadcrumb section, main content, footer. Portfolio page has a CSS grid of project cards. Blog page has article previews with sidebar. The 404 page links back to Home.

hard.title: Build a Complete Business Website with 10+ Pages
hard.description: Create a full business website with 10+ HTML pages including: Home, About (with team, history, mission sub-sections via anchors), Services (with individual service pages), Pricing, Portfolio (with project detail pages), Blog (with 3 individual article pages), FAQ, Contact, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, and 404. Implement: sticky header, breadcrumbs on all pages, sidebar navigation on Services section, footer with 4-column link grid, schema.org breadcrumb structured data, and responsive navigation with hamburger toggle.
hard.starterCode:
BusinessCo

  • Contact

Welcome to BusinessCo

Services

Company

Support

Legal

© 2026 BusinessCo
hard.solution: Build a complete 10+ page site. All pages share the same CSS file. Navigation includes a hamburger menu for mobile using the checkbox hack. Each section has its own sub-navigation. Blog has individual article HTML files linked from the main blog page. Schema.org breadcrumb JSON-LD is embedded in each page. Test all links with a broken link checker.
